text: {"type":"CODE_BUILDER","title":"","lessonText":"Create your own chord progressions using this interactive tool. If you select all options and none provide the correct answer, please check the following: ensure you are using the correct chord names and progressions, verify that your selections match the intended musical key, and consider trying different combinations of chords.","data":{"codeBuilder":{"avatarInstruction":"Use the code below to build your chord progression.","lines":[{"content":"C - G - Am - F"},{"content":"D - A - Bm - G"},{"content":"E - B - C#m - A"},{"content":"F - C - Dm - Bb"}],"options":["C - G - Am - F","D - A - Bm - G","E - B - C#m - A","F - C - Dm - Bb"]}}}
